European conference seasons used to feel predictable. A handful of blockchain events in Q1, some developer summits in the summer, a few institutional gatherings to close the year. That’s no longer the case.

Between MiCA taking hold, the convergence of AI and blockchain gaining real traction, and institutional capital entering the space more deliberately than before, the crypto conferences in Europe in 2026 look different from prior years — denser, more specialized, and in some cases significantly more expensive. Crypto Expo Europe in Bucharest and EthCC in Cannes serve very different corners of the same world, so do a massive gathering in Istanbul and a robotics-meets-AI summit at the Carrousel du Louvre in Paris.

At **[Web3Voyager](https://web3voyager.com/)**, tracking crypto events in Europe — and globally — is what we do. With dozens of blockchain conferences and summits on the 2026 calendar, not all of them deserve the same attention. This list covers 10 that do, whether for their focus, their track record, or the specific crowd they pull. Some are blockchain-native; others are broader tech gatherings where AI and digital assets increasingly collide.

## 1. [Crypto Expo Europe](https://web3voyager.com/event/crypto-expo-europe-2026-eur/)

**When:** March 1–2, 2026  
 **Where:** Bucharest, Romania

### **What it’s about**

**Eastern Europe’s largest crypto event**

Crypto Expo Europe draws over 3,000 attendees, 100+ speakers, and 59+ exhibitors across 5,000 sqm of expo space. It’s a broad-tent event — covering crypto trends, DeFi, NFTs, tokenization, and enterprise blockchain — and notably more accessible in price and format than its Western European equivalents.

**Regulation as a primary thread**

With MiCA now in effect across the EU, compliance discussions have moved from background noise to center stage. Crypto Expo Europe has become a meeting point for legal experts, fintech professionals, and regional enterprises figuring out what the rules mean in practice.

**Speakers and networking**

Justin Sun (Tron) and Sebastien Borget (The Sandbox) are among confirmed speakers, alongside founders, investors, and fintech operators. The format — 81+ workshops across multiple tracks — is built to serve both newcomers and professionals looking to move deals forward.

**Tickets and practical info**

Standard pass: €99 + VAT (expo and seminars). Premium: €199 + VAT (adds lunch and VIP lounge). VIP: €399 + VAT (full access including the award gala). Group discounts available for 5+ attendees.

## 2. [Next Block Expo](https://web3voyager.com/event/next-block-expo-2026/)

**When:** March 24–25, 2026  
 **Where:** Warsaw, Poland

### **What it’s about**

**A blockchain festival, not just a conference**

Next Block Expo calls itself a festival, and the format earns it: 5,000+ attendees, 200+ speakers, 80+ Web3 brands, a pitch arena, the NBX Awards, and a full schedule of side events during [Polish Blockchain Week](https://web3voyager.com/event/polish-blockchain-week-2026-eur/). It’s a high-energy environment, deliberately so.

**Warsaw as a real Web3 hub**

Next Block Expo is a good barometer of how seriously Central and Eastern Europe is being taken in this space now. The agenda — crypto, AI, DeFi, trading, legal compliance, TradFi integrations, RWAs, gaming — is competing directly with what’s on offer in Paris or London.

**Speakers and deal flow**

Robby Yung (CEO, Animoca Brands), Miko Matsumura (Gumi Cryptos Capital), and Marouane Essaïdi (Solana Foundation) are among the confirmed names, with others from MEXC, BingX, and zondacrypto. Good event for startups looking for early-stage deal flow and enterprises mapping the CEE market.

**Tickets and practical info**

General pass: $95 USD. Startup, Investor, and VIP tiers go up to $1,089 USD. Video-on-demand access included for 90 days post-event.

## 3. [EthCC](https://web3voyager.com/event/ethcc-9-2026-eur/)

**When:** March 30–April 2, 2026  
 **Where:** Cannes, France

### **What it’s about**

**The largest annual Ethereum event in Europe**

EthCC accredits 6,500+ attendees and pulls over 10,000 people to Cannes across the main event and community-organized side events. It has held onto a reputation for substance — programming is dense, the crowd is technical, and the Cannes setting is incidental. The location is not the point.

**Technology and institutional integration**

The 2026 edition covers Ethereum’s technical roadmap alongside growing institutional participation: DeFi, RWA tokenization, applied cryptography, and what professionalizing the Ethereum ecosystem actually means for builders. Confirmed speakers include Vitalik Buterin (Ethereum), Stani Kulechov (Aave), and Jean-Marc Stenger (Societe Generale-Forge), among others.

**Community-run structure**

What sets EthCC apart from events of similar size is how much of the programming is community-generated. Side events are organized independently, creating a distributed schedule that extends well beyond the main hall.

**Tickets and practical info**

Full Pass: €500 incl. VAT (4 days, swag and catering). EthCC + Agora (institutional forum): €1,300. EthVC (investor-focused): €1,500. Single day: €125, opening February 23. 400 free student spots available via application on the site. Tickets are non-transferable.

## 4. [Paris Blockchain Week](https://web3voyager.com/event/paris-blockchain-week-2026-eur/)

**When:** April 15–16, 2026 (side events April 11–16)  
 **Where:** Paris, France

### **What it’s about**

**Where TradFi and digital assets have the serious conversations**

Paris Blockchain Week draws 10,000+ attendees and a speaker list pulled from banks, asset managers, regulators, and blockchain foundations. The emphasis is on working through the mechanics of what adoption looks like at an institutional level.

**Policy and digital finance front and center**

The 2026 agenda covers MiCA, market structure, tokenization, custody, stablecoins, and AI-blockchain convergence. Speakers include Dr. Nouriel Roubini (NYU), Natasha Cazenave (ESMA), Nikhil Sharma (BlackRock), and people from Fidelity, Deutsche Bank, and Invesco. The 150+ sessions run from founder pitches to policy debates to private dinners at Versailles.

**Worth knowing**

If there’s one event on this list built specifically for banks, asset managers, and infrastructure providers trying to understand where digital assets land within regulated frameworks, this is it.

**Tickets and practical info**

Pro passes: €999 early bird, €1,199 standard (expo and main stages). VIP Investor: €1,999 (adds investor meetups and private breakfasts). All passes include a networking app and food and drinks. Book at [tickets.parisblockchainweek.com](https://tickets.parisblockchainweek.com/) and use code **VOYAGER15** at checkout for 15% off your ticket.

## 5. [Crypto Valley Conference](https://web3voyager.com/event/crypto-valley-conference/)

**When:** May 28–29, 2026  
 **Where:** Rotkreuz, Switzerland

### **What it’s about**

**The most substantive blockchain gathering in Switzerland**

Now in its 8th edition, Crypto Valley Conference sits in an unusual spot: it’s not a mass-market expo, and it’s not a pure developer event. It brings together academics, engineers, government officials, and institutional players in a format built around rigorous discussion.

**The agenda follows the money and the research**

The 2026 program covers institutional yield generation, global digital asset regulation, geopolitics, RWA tokenization, stablecoins and CBDCs, on-chain asset management, and blockchain VC strategy — 125+ speakers across 40+ presentations and 7 masterclasses.

**Speakers and format**

Pascal Gauthier (Ledger), Thomas Moser (Swiss National Bank), Frederik Gregaard (Cardano Foundation), Lily Liu (Solana Foundation), and Dominic Williams (DFINITY) are among confirmed names. There’s also a Lake Zug boat cruise, which is a small detail but consistent with the conference’s emphasis on actual relationship-building.

**Tickets and practical info**

Pricing had not been released at time of writing. Previous editions ranged from €200–500. A call for papers is open. Sign up via the official website for updates.

## 6. [Istanbul Blockchain Week](https://web3voyager.com/event/istanbul-blockchain-week/)

**When:** June 2–3, 2026  
 **Where:** Istanbul, Türkiye

### **What it’s about**

**The biggest Web3 event in the Europe-Asia corridor**

Istanbul Blockchain Week draws 5,000+ attendees across a main summit, exhibition floor, DeFAI hackathon, and a showcase that has featured over 17,000 projects in previous editions. It operates at a scale that puts it in direct conversation with the larger Western European events.

**DeFi, AI, and autonomous economies**

The 2026 agenda covers blockchain, DeFi, AI, RWA tokenization, stablecoins, and privacy — spread across fireside chats, roundtables, and workshops over two days. Past speakers include Justin Sun (TRON) and Kostas Chalkias (Mysten Labs); the 2026 lineup is forthcoming.

**Real government engagement**

One of Istanbul Blockchain Week’s more unusual features is direct participation from Turkish regulatory bodies — the Capital Markets Board of Türkiye has had a presence at past editions. That makes it particularly useful for projects trying to get a read on how regulation is moving in the region.

**Tickets and practical info**

Attendee: €299. Pro: €449 (adds RWA stage and lunch). VIP: €1,999 (full premium access). Separate pricing for Turkish residents. Hotel partnerships offer 20% off accommodation.

## 7. [GITEX AI Europe](https://web3voyager.com/event/gitex-europe-2026/)

**When:** June 30–July 1, 2026  
 **Where:** Berlin, Germany

### **What it’s about**

**Europe’s largest AI-focused tech event**

GITEX AI Europe is the European arm of GITEX Global, one of the world’s biggest tech exhibitions. The Berlin edition focuses on AI across 14+ stages and country pavilions — covering GenAI, policy and ethics, deep tech, quantum computing, cybersecurity, green tech, mobility, and digital finance in one sprawling program.

**Startups compete alongside the incumbents**

The Supernova All-Stars Pitch Competition (€100,000 prize) brings early-stage companies into direct contact with investors and enterprise buyers. The event pulls startups, government delegations, and large corporations simultaneously — which makes it wide-ranging, but also creates cross-sector interactions that more focused events can’t offer.

**Speaker caliber**

Geoffrey Hinton is among the featured names, alongside 500+ speakers from governments, global tech companies, and emerging AI labs. The event is a strong signal of Berlin’s growing role in European AI policy conversations.

**Tickets and practical info**

A single-day visitor pass is €30; two days is €30 at early bird pricing (€50 after). For those who want full conference access — stages, sessions, the works — the All Access Conference Pass is €225 early bird (€450 regular). The Premium Pass sits at €2,000 for top-tier access.

## 8. [RAISE Summit](https://web3voyager.com/event/raise-summit/)

**When:** July 8–9, 2026  
 **Where:** Paris, France

### **What it’s about**

**An AI summit built for executives**

RAISE Summit is oriented toward enterprise adoption and capital allocation, not technical depth. With 9,000+ attendees, 2,000 companies, 350+ speakers, and 80% C-level participation, the conversations here are about ROI, strategy, and deployment, not research for its own sake.

**Four tracks, one agenda**

Programming runs across Foundation (AI infrastructure), Friction (governance), Frontier (innovation), and Future (long-term trends). RAISE also runs the world’s largest AI hackathon alongside the main event and Machina, a dedicated robotics and embodied intelligence program.

**Speaker lineup**

Mark Cuban, Vlad Tenev (CEO, Robinhood), Eric Schmidt (Former Google CEO), and Marcelo Claure (CEO, Claure Group) are among the 2026 speakers. The tone throughout is capital and strategy — who’s deploying AI, how, and at what cost.

**Tickets and practical info**

Pro: €999. VIP: €1,899 (adds Machina access, valued separately at €699). VIP Max: €3,499 — limited spots, full access. Early bird available now. Some tiers include hackathon entry.

## 9. [CONF3RENCE](https://web3voyager.com/event/conf3rence/)

**When:** September 15–16, 2026  
 **Where:** Dortmund, Germany

### **What it’s about**

**Two days, two distinct audiences**

Day 1 of CONF3RENCE is B2B-focused; Day 2 is open to the public. The split is deliberate — it lets the event serve enterprise buyers and institutional attendees without abandoning the community side that makes these gatherings useful for developers and curious outsiders alike.

**Web3 and frontier tech in an unusual venue**

The agenda spans Web3, AI, blockchain, metaverse, and AR/VR, with a focus on where emerging tech meets actual business adoption. Speakers include Bastian Schuetz (Global Lead, Virtual & Mixed Reality Solutions), Frederik Gregaard (CEO, Cardano), and others from tech and Web3.

The venue itself — Kokerei Hansa, a converted industrial coking plant and UNESCO World Heritage site — gives the event an atmosphere that no convention center can manufacture. It’s worth noting for anyone who cares about where they spend two days.

**Tickets and practical info**

Regular: €199 (both days, keynotes, expo, and a free hardware wallet). VIP: €499 (adds a stadium tour, exclusive areas, and the after party). Day 2 is free with a mandatory ticket — limited supply, so book early.

## 10. [European Blockchain Convention](https://web3voyager.com/event/european-blockchain-convention-2026/)

**When:** September 16–17, 2026  
 **Where:** Barcelona, Spain

### **What it’s about**

**One of the largest blockchain events in Europe by raw numbers**

European Blockchain Convention consistently pulls 6,000+ attendees, 300+ speakers, and 200 exhibitors across multiple stages at Fira Barcelona Montjuïc. The programming covers blockchain, digital assets, institutional adoption, DeFi, and security — broad by design, built to serve a diverse attendee base.

**An exchange-heavy speaker lineup**

The 2026 speaker list features CEOs and regional directors from OKX, Bullish, Bybit EU, and Bitpanda. That concentration of exchange leadership is telling — if you work in trading infrastructure, market structure, or products that touch exchanges, the networking value here is unusually high.

**Barcelona’s place in the calendar**

EBC has become a defining event in the Barcelona Web3 calendar year after year, which says something about the city’s standing as one of Europe’s more active blockchain communities.

**Tickets and practical info**

General pass: €500 early bird, rising to €1,100 at late pricing (excl. 10% VAT, 2-day). VIP: €800–€1,600. President tier (premium networking): €2,499–€7,000. Early bird is currently ongoing. Group rates and student discounts may be available.

## Keeping Track Beyond This List

This list covers 10 events, but the European calendar runs much deeper — developer hackathons, policy roundtables, community meetups, and country-specific gatherings run throughout the year, often alongside or just before the larger events above. Browse the full list at **Web3Voyager**, and if you’re organizing an event, you can [submit it for review](https://web3voyager.com/post-event/).

Dates, pricing, and speaker lineups change. Always check directly on each event’s official website before registering.

Fortify Your ZK Projects With Unmatched Security

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

As Web3 continues to evolve and expand, bridges have become essential infrastructure, connecting different blockchains and allowing seamless interoperability.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/AI-Audit.svg)

Building, integrating, or using AI? Our expertise protects your innovations every step of the way.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Zero-Knowledge-Proof02.svg)

![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Zero-Knowledge-Proof02.svg)

At its heart, a zero knowledge proof feels like a cryptographic magic trick of sorts: proving you know a secret, or that a complex computation was performed correctly, without revealing the secret or the computation steps themselves.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Tokenomics-design.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Tokenomics-design.svg)

You’ve likely invested in comprehensive code audits for your smart contracts. That’s essential. But if your project has a token, then a parallel layer of complex risk exists that traditional code analysis alone cannot fully address: the tokenomics.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/security-audits.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Web3-Security-Audits.png)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Web3-Security-Audits.png)

The emerging world of Web3 is filled with innovation and exciting opportunities, however, as with any new digital territory, it comes with its share of security risks.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Formal-Verification.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Formal-Verification.svg)

Building on the blockchain means coding the future and creating smart contracts that run like clockwork – transparent, automated, and secure. But here’s the kicker: ‘immutable’ means mistakes stick. Permanently.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/On-Chain-Monitoring.png)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/On-Chain-Monitoring.png)

Security goes beyond smart contract audits. Detect breaches instantly and receive immediate alerts for any suspicious activities with real-time on-chain monitoring.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/failsafe-cude.png)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/failsafe-cude.png)

Continuously monitor your smart contracts for risk and stop fraud and security breaches in real-time.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Incident-response.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Incident-response.svg)

Alerts flash of unexpected contract behaviour and funds moving where they shouldn’t.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Testing-Services.png)

![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Testing-Services.png)

Assisting projects and teams by writing and reviewing unit, integration, fuzz, and other test types to catch edge case vulnerabilities, increase test coverage and mitigate risk.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Security-Score-Services.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Security-Score-Services.svg)

Security is the lifeblood of trust and the foundation for long-term success in the blockchain arena. But how do you truly know if your project is secure? How do you quantify the strength of your defences against the ever-evolving threat landscape?

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Operation-Crypto-Automation.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Operation-Crypto-Automation.svg)

Scaling your Web3 project shouldn’t mean multiplying the stress levels or the risks. In traditional tech, robust operating systems and automation handles all of the heavy lifting, providing optimised efficiency and reliability – so why should Web3 be any different?

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Corporate-Blockchain-Security.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Corporate-Blockchain-Security.svg)

Protect your corporate blockchain infrastructure with expert security solutions.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Secure your Discord servers and solutions from threats, attacks, and compromises with our cybersecurity services

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/bitcoin.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/bitcoin.svg)

Secure your Bitcoin with Hashlock’s expert services, including Bitcoin audits, secure wallet solutions, and comprehensive ecosystem security support.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/compliance-advisory.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Startup-Support.png)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Startup-Support.png)

Hashlock is a leading active party for helping web3 & Blockchain startups receive funding, VC, grants and capital in todays current market.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Web3-KYC.png)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/Web3-KYC.png)

We help to safely & securely validate the identity of a web3 project’s team to their community.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Proof-of-Reserves.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Proof-of-Reserves.svg)

Your crypto exchange is not so dissimilar to a tightly sealed submarine, plunging into abyssal ocean trenches. Every valve, every weld, every pressure gauge must be perfect – because even the faintest flaw can lead to a catastrophic implosion!

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Industry-research.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Industry-research.svg)

Trying to keep your head above the ocean of emerging information in the blockchain space feels like a full-time job in itself, doesn’t it?

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/vara.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/vara.svg)

Comprehensive security audits, transaction monitoring, access control, and risk management solutions, all with proper documentation — everything you need to confidently achieve and maintain VARA compliance.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/dora-c.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/dora-c.svg)

Avoid penalties, fines, and reputational risk—achieve full DORA compliance with Hashlock. We cover every critical requirement from ICT risk management frameworks and incident response to third-party scrutiny and beyond.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Crypto-Advisory02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Crypto-Advisory02.svg)

When looking at a Web3 project, people see the dApp, the tokens, the community, and the potential returns. What they don’t see is the ‘invisible code’ – the layers of underlying logic, the complex interactions between smart contracts and protocols, the subtle economic incentives, and the hidden dependencies.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Proof-of-Reserves.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Proof-of-Reserves.svg)

Audit your system to meet the highest crypto security standard — become CCSS certified and demonstrate that your solution is robust, resilient, and built with industry best practices.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Industry-research.png)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Industry-research.png)

Our Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) services deliver protection against internal and external risks. Covering security strategy, data protection, system reviews, third-party risk assessments, compliance and staff training.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Ecosystem-Hub02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Polygon-Auditing02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Polygon-Auditing02.svg)

Billions in value, millions of users, and constantly flowing assets across a network of interconnected layers – the Polygon ecosystem is a high-value, high-activity target.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/BSC02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/BSC02.svg)

Binance Smart Chain’s immense popularity is not only a metric of success, but a giant bullseye. With its low barrier to entry and high concentration of users and value, the BSC ecosystem attracts sophisticated attackers looking to capitalise on scale.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Solana-Blockchain02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Solana-Blockchain02.svg)

The sheer volume of value moving and stored within the Solana ecosystem is staggering – billions locked in DeFi protocols, millions in valuable NFTs, and a constant flow of high-speed transactions. This makes Solana a premier target for sophisticated attackers who understand its unique architecture and can capitalise on vulnerabilities at unprecedented speed.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Zksync02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Zksync02.svg)

Everyone knows ZKsync inherits Ethereum’s robust security. That’s foundational to its appeal. You trust the underlying Layer 2 infrastructure, the integrity of the rollups, the power of ZK proofs.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Cosmos-Auditing02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Cosmos-Auditing02.svg)

The power of Cosmos lies in sovereignty; the ability for developers to build custom chains with their own governance, validator sets, and technical stacks – while connecting seamlessly to others.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Avalanche-Auditing02.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/Avalanche-Auditing02.svg)

Assets on Avalanche move with incredible speed. That’s the promise of rapid finality. But billions in value are now flowing across distinct chains (X, P, C) and into numerous subnets, managed by users via their Avalanche wallet.

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Stacks-Ecosystem.svg)
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20800%20612'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Stacks-Ecosystem.svg)

Venturing into any blockchain ecosystem, especially one as innovative as the Stacks Ecosystem, comes with its own set of unique challenges. In this regard, security isn’t just a feature, but the foundation upon which your entire project rests.

# Top Crypto & Web3 Conferences to Attend and Network in 2026

![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/ChatGPT-Image-Nov-27-2025-12_03_14-PM-1024x683.png)

Crypto and Web3 conferences remain one of the most powerful ways to tap directly into the people and ideas shaping the industry’s future. These gatherings bring together founders, investors, developers, marketers, regulators, and thought leaders driving the evolution of blockchain, crypto, and Web3. 

They also open the door to partnerships, funding opportunities, deal flow, fresh ideas, technical insights, and practical hacks you can apply immediately. This guide breaks down the top crypto and Web3 events for 2026, organized by region, and includes confirmed dates and locations. 

## **North America**

North America remains the beating heart of global crypto innovation and the largest institutional presence. The region hosts high-impact events that shape narratives, spark funding deals, and bring together thousands of builders, founders, and investors. Below are the top crypto and Web3 events in the USA, Canada and North America as a whole in 2026.

### **1. ETH Denver**

![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201872%20669'%3E%3C/svg%3E)![](https://hashlock.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/ETH-Denver.png)

Marking our first entry in the North America lineup, **ETHDenver** stands as the world’s largest and longest-running Ethereum innovation festival. At this builder-first gathering, developers, founders, designers, and Web3 creatives come together to experiment, build, and push the next wave of decentralized tech.

At the heart of the event is #BUIDL City, a hybrid digital-and-physical playground where thousands collaborate on prototypes, attend workshops, join hackathons, and network across themed innovation zones. ETHDenver blends technical depth with festival energy.

**Date:** February 17–21, 2026

**Country:** USA

**Location:** National Western Center, Denver, Colorado

**Website:** [ethdenver.com](https://ethdenver.com?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

**Socials:** [@ETHDenver](https://x.com/ethereumdenver) (X), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ethdenver/)

Korea Blockchain Week (KBW) is one of Asia’s largest and most influential Web3 festivals, held annually in Seoul. In 2025, the week-long gathering (Sept 22–28) recorded 72,700+ attendees, 870+ speakers, 410+ sponsors, and hosted over 1,230 side events, according to its official numbers.

The flagship IMPACT conference brings together global leaders, founders, and institutions to exchange insights on blockchain, AI, real-world asset tokenization, regulation, and more. 

Beyond formal sessions, KBW delivers a festival-like experience, uniting serious Web3 discourse with music, art, culture, and networking.

**Date:** TBD, 2026

From Devconnect and Token2049 to the Australian Crypto Convention, our team actively attends, hosts side events, and engages with builders, investors, and infrastructure providers worldwide.

# List of Blockchain Events, Conferences, and Hackathons 2025 – 2026

Promote your event or explore media partnerships—reach us here: [events@timesofblockchain.com](mailto:events@timesofblockchain.com)

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| 10-17, 2026 | [Power Purchase Agreement (Spring Session)](https://www.infocusinternational.com/ppa-online)  Live Online  ---   Power Purchase Agreements (PPAs) operate in many different contexts. They can be used to support the development of new projects, or for the supply of energy from existing projects. They can be written by independent power producers, governments or utilities. They can operate in regions with sophisticated power exchanges and markets, and they can also operate in developing countries with a single buyer and a centralized monopoly power utility. In the sessions of this course, we cover each of these contexts. |
| Mar  04-26, 2026 | [Aleph March '26](https://aleph.crecimiento.build/)  Buenos Aires, Argentina  ---   The Aleph March ’26 is a dedicated crypto-native conference designed as a long-form builder environment for Web3 teams, researchers, and protocol developers. Unlike traditional blockchain summits that emphasize short, high-intensity sessions, Aleph focuses on extended collaboration, co-working, and co-living, creating space for projects to evolve over weeks rather than days. The program is structured around multiple touchpoints across March, enabling participants to test ideas, ship code, and receive feedback in real time. With its emphasis on hands-on collaboration, infrastructure workshops, and governance dialogues, Aleph March ’26 acts as a point of convergence for diverse crypto ecosystems, fostering deeper knowledge exchange and long-term innovation. |
| Mar  12-21, 2026 | [AI x CRYPTO EXPO 2026](https://aixcryptoexpo.com/)  Silicon Valley, USA  ---   The AI x CRYPTO EXPO 2026 in Silicon Valley is a groundbreaking event at the intersection of artificial intelligence and blockchain innovation. Designed as a global hub for founders, investors, developers, and regulators, the expo explores how AI technologies are reshaping crypto, Web3, DeFi, NFTs, and digital assets. Over ten days, participants will engage in keynotes, panels, product showcases, and networking sessions, highlighting AI-driven trading, decentralized intelligence, security solutions, and next-gen blockchain applications. With its unique focus on convergence, the expo positions itself as a strategic platform for collaboration, investment, and trend-setting in the AI + crypto ecosystem. |
| Mar  17-19, 2026 | [MERGE São Paulo 2026](https://www.mmerge.io/es/merge-sao-paulo-2026)  São Paulo, Brazil  ---   MERGE São Paulo 2026 in Brazil will bring together technology leaders, innovators, investors, and policymakers to explore the convergence of AI, blockchain, fintech, and emerging technologies. Organized by MERGE, the conference emphasizes digital transformation, decentralized finance, sustainability, and enterprise adoption, while fostering dialogue on regional opportunities and global collaboration. The program will feature keynotes, panel discussions, exhibitions, and networking sessions covering topics such as Web3 ecosystems, AI-driven industries, cybersecurity, and smart infrastructure. Attendees will gain actionable insights into both strategic leadership and practical implementation, making MERGE a hub for innovation and collaboration in Latin America’s technology landscape. |
| Mar  18-19, 2026 | [Crypto Assets Regulation & Compliance Conference 2026](https://www.tci-sa.co.za/crypto-assets-regulation-compliance-conference-2026/)  Johannesburg, South Africa  ---   Crypto Assets Regulation & Compliance Conference 2026 is a premier summit hosted in Johannesburg, South Africa, dedicated to addressing the evolving regulatory and compliance landscape for crypto assets. Organized by Trade Conferences International (TCI), the event convenes regulators, financial institutions, legal experts, and blockchain innovators to explore frameworks shaping digital asset adoption. With keynote addresses, panel discussions, and case studies, the program highlights anti-money laundering (AML), combating the financing of terrorism (CFT), tax compliance, licensing, and supervisory practices. Attendees will gain insights into regulatory trends, compliance strategies, and risk management approaches, fostering collaboration and strategic partnerships across the financial ecosystem. |
| Mar  19-20, 2026 | [AutoSec Europe and SDV & AIDV Week 2026](https://autosecsummit.com/)  Frankfurt, Germany  ---   The AutoSec Europe and SDV & AIDV Week 2026 summit is positioned as the first and most informative flag event in 2026. This year’s conference will bring more than 40 heavyweight speakers from China and Europe into direct dialogue, alongside over 30 OEMs and 200+ professional delegates from every tier of the ecosystem. Together they will dive deep into the AI Act, the RED Directive, GB44495 & GB44496 and other related laws and regulations, while also exploring the industry’s hottest technical solutions—AI, PQC, cross-border data transfer, cybersecurity of EV charging infrastructure, SDV, AIDV, next generation E/E architectures, intelligent cockpits and autonomous driving. At present, NIO, XPENG, Volkswagen, Daimler AG, Microsoft, NXP, ZF, AUMOVIO have confirmed their speaking slots, with more to be announced. |
| Mar  23-25, 2026 | [Black Swan Summit 2026](https://australia.blackswansummit.com/)  Perth, Australia  ---   The Black Swan Summit 2026 is a premier global forum dedicated to exploring the intersection of disruptive technologies and sustainable innovation. Designed as a convergence point for thought leaders, technologists, policymakers, and investors, the summit highlights how emerging fields such as blockchain, artificial intelligence, quantum computing, Web3, climate tech, and digital finance can be harnessed to address pressing global challenges. Unlike traditional tech conferences, the Black Swan Summit emphasizes impact-driven innovation, showcasing how advanced technologies can contribute to climate solutions, sustainable development, and inclusive growth. With over 1,500 international participants, the summit fosters collaboration across industries, encouraging dialogue on both the opportunities and responsibilities that come with transformative technologies. |
| Mar  23-26, 2026 | [SPiCE South Asia 2026](https://www.spiceseries.com/ssa)  Colombo, Sri Lanka  ---   SPiCE South Asia 2026 returns to Colombo for its seventh edition, where regulatory developments, market insights, and best practices across India, Sri Lanka, and the broader South Asian gaming ecosystem will be discussed. The summit takes place at the Shangri-La Colombo and offers expert-led panels, affiliate networking, the SPiCE Breaker reception. The event package includes a choice of a curated poker tournament, and to bring highlights such as Eventus Awards together with five-star standard luxury like only a debutant participant can. Its audience consists of operators, suppliers, affiliates and regulators from 4+ continents, making it a leading venue for strategic dialogue and regional growth. |
| Mar  23-29, 2026 | [Polish Blockchain Week 2026](https://polishblockchainweek.com/)  Warsaw, Poland  ---   The Polish Blockchain Week 2026 (PBW) is a nationwide celebration of blockchain and Web3 innovation, designed as a week-long convergence of technology, creativity, and community. Unlike single-location conferences, PBW unfolds across multiple Polish cities, bringing together developers, builders, artists, and investors in a collaborative environment that blends learning with cultural exploration. The program is powered by grassroots Web3 groups, builders, and developers, reflecting a decentralized spirit of teamwork and idea-sharing. The highlight of the week is Next Block Expo (NBX), hosted at EXPO XXI in Warsaw, which serves as the central gathering point for large-scale discussions, showcases, and networking. With its mix of regional events, national collaboration, and global participation, PBW positions Poland as a vibrant hub for blockchain adoption and ecosystem growth. |
| Mar  24-25, 2026 | [London PropTech Show](https://proptechshow.com/)  London, UK  ---   London PropTech Show is Europe’s leading trade show and conference dedicated to real estate technology. It brings together global real estate professionals, proptech entrepreneurs, investors, policymakers, and technology providers to explore innovations in smart buildings, AI, IoT, blockchain, sustainability, and urban planning. With expert-led seminars, startup pitch competitions, and tailored networking sessions, the event offers a dynamic platform to shape the future of property through technology. |
| Mar  24-25, 2026 | [Next Block Expo 2026](https://nextblockexpo.com/)  Warsaw, Poland  ---   The Next Block Expo 2026 in Warsaw, Poland is one of Europe’s largest blockchain festivals, bringing together the Web3, crypto, and blockchain community under one roof. The event serves as a hub for founders, investors, developers, regulators, and innovators, offering a dynamic mix of keynotes, panels, workshops, and exhibitions. NBX emphasizes Web3 adoption, DeFi, NFTs, DAOs, gaming, and tokenization, while also showcasing startups, venture capital opportunities, and cutting-edge blockchain solutions. With thousands of participants expected, the expo is designed to foster networking, deal-making, and collaboration across the global digital asset ecosystem. |
| Mar  24-25, 2026 | [HIPTHER Prague Summit](https://hipther.com/events/prague-summit/)  Prague, Czech Republic  ---   HIPTHER Prague Summit 2026 is where tech, compliance, and innovation meet, bringing together a global audience across iGaming, eSports, blockchain, AI, and fintech. Hosted in Prague, the two-day program features expert talks, roundtables, HIPTHER Academy workshops, and curated networking designed for operators, suppliers, and innovators across Europe. The summit also hosts the GamingTECH CEE Awards 2026, celebrating excellence in the regional gaming and tech ecosystem. Distinguished speakers include Bill Pascrell III (BP3), Arnav Dutta, Sarah Blackburn, Dr. Joerg Hofmann, Dr. Arthur Stadler, Kaspar Szymanski, Jaka Repanšek, and more. |
| Mar  24-26, 2026 | [DSC Next 2026](https://dscnextconference.com/)  Amsterdam, Netherlands  ---   DSCNext Conference, also known as the 2nd International Data Science Conference 2026, is a premier global platform for data science and machine learning professionals and researchers. As the flagship edition of the SPiCE Series, the summit will spotlight cross‑border regulatory frameworks, global market expansion, and responsible gaming practices, while fostering collaboration between governments, enterprises, and innovators from diverse regions. The summit will feature keynotes, panel discussions, exhibitions, and networking sessions covering topics such as sports betting, iGaming, lotteries, blockchain integration, fintech applications, and international compliance strategies. Beyond its immediate agenda, SPiCE International 2026 underscores Port Moresby’s role as a strategic meeting point for global stakeholders, positioning the summit as a catalyst for international partnerships, regulatory harmonization, and sustainable growth across the worldwide gaming ecosystem. |
| Nov  12-19, 2026 | [EPC Contracts for Energy Industry (Autumn Session)](https://www.infocusinternational.com/epc-online)  Live Online  ---   EPC Contracts for Energy Industry – Online Training 2026 is a specialized executive program designed for energy executives, project managers, legal advisors, and investors. Delivered as a live online course, it provides a comprehensive overview of Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) contracts in the energy sector. The program covers risk allocation, contract structures, negotiation strategies, dispute resolution, and project financing, supported by real-world case studies. Participants will gain practical insights into best practices for drafting, managing, and executing EPC contracts, ensuring successful delivery of complex energy projects. |
| Nov  16-19, 2026 | [Electricity Economics in Changing Electricity Markets (Autumn Session)](https://www.infocusinternational.com/electricityeconomics-online)  Live Online  ---   Electricity Economics in Changing Electricity Markets – Online 2026 is a specialized executive training course designed for power generators, utilities, investors, policymakers, and energy strategists. Delivered as a live online program, it provides a clear, accessible, and business-focused introduction to the economics of power generation and electricity markets in a low-carbon world. The course examines the full value chain, from power plant cost structures and financing to end-customer pricing and market liberalisation, contextualized with global case studies. Participants will explore the impact of renewable integration, decentralised systems, policy frameworks, and competitive market structures on electricity costs and value creation. |
| Nov  24-25, 2026 | [SPiCE: The Reunion 2026](https://www.spiceseries.com/spice-reunion)  Goa, India  ---   SPiCE: The Reunion 2026 will bring together gaming operators, regulators, investors, and technology providers for a celebratory edition of the SPiCE Series in Goa, India. This special gathering will spotlight industry milestones, regulatory progress, and market expansion across South Asia, while fostering dialogue between regional stakeholders and international brands in a festive and collaborative atmosphere. The summit will feature keynotes, panel discussions, exhibitions, and networking sessions covering topics such as sports betting, iGaming, lotteries, blockchain integration, fintech applications, and responsible gaming practices. Beyond its immediate agenda, SPiCE: The Reunion 2026 underscores Goa’s symbolic role as the birthplace of the SPiCE Series, positioning the summit as a catalyst for renewed partnerships, industry reflection, and sustainable growth in the global gaming ecosystem. |
| 01-02, 2026 | [Blockchain Life 2026](https://blockchain-life.com/autumn2026/)  Dubai, UAE  ---   Blockchain Life 2026 Forum is the global meeting point for the world of web3, cryptocurrencies, and mining. The 17th Edition will take place in Dubai on December 1–2. The Forum brings together crypto whales, founders, and top executives of the leading companies, gathering over 15,000 participants from 130+ countries. Visionary speakers will unveil key insights, forecasts, and strategies to maximize opportunities during the Bull Run. Known for the high-level networking, Blockchain Life 2026 remains the must-attend event defining the global crypto market. |
| Dec  01-03, 2026 | [CLO Summit 2026](https://opalgroup.net/finance/clo-summit-2026/)  Dana Point, CA  ---   The CLO Summit 2026, hosted in Dana Point, California, is Opal Group’s flagship U.S. forum dedicated to collateralized loan obligations and structured credit. Designed for investors, issuers, managers, and regulators, the summit provides a comprehensive exploration of the CLO market, with a focus on deal structuring, credit risk, regulatory developments, and ESG integration. Unlike broader investment conferences, this summit emphasizes specialized technical expertise and deal-flow opportunities, offering in-depth sessions, case studies, and closed-door discussions tailored to the needs of CLO professionals. Attendees benefit from curated networking and direct engagement with leading managers and investors, positioning the summit as a premier platform for advancing strategies and forging partnerships in the evolving structured credit landscape. |
| Dec  02-03, 2026 | [Blockchain Revolution Summit 2026](https://www.blockchainrevolution.it/)  Bolzano, Italy  ---   The Blockchain Revolution Summit 2026 is a premier hybrid event bringing together distinguished experts, innovators, and enterprises to explore the cutting edge of blockchain, Web3, DeFi, AI, IoT, Big Data, metaverse, and cybersecurity. Unlike traditional single-track conferences, the summit blends keynote presentations, interactive panels, live workshops, and networking sessions, creating a dynamic environment for accelerating digital transformation across industries. With 50+ speakers from Italy and abroad, 60–80 companies showcasing technology, and a strong emphasis on live demos and workshops, the summit positions itself as a key European hub for blockchain adoption and cross-industry innovation. |
| Dec  03-04, 2026 | [ABS & Fintech Specialty Finance Forum 2026](https://opalgroup.net/finance/abs-and-fintech-specialty-finance-forum-2026/)  Dana Point, CA  ---   The ABS & Fintech Specialty Finance Forum 2026, hosted in Dana Point, California, is Opal Group’s premier platform for exploring the convergence of asset-backed securities and fintech-driven specialty finance. Designed for investors, issuers, and innovators, the forum highlights how technology is reshaping structured finance, consumer lending, and alternative credit markets. Sessions cover securitization trends, digital lending platforms, regulatory developments, and ESG integration, while showcasing fintech innovations that are transforming capital flows and risk management. With a blend of technical panels, case studies, and curated networking, the forum positions itself as a forward-looking hub where finance professionals and fintech leaders collaborate to unlock new opportunities in specialty finance. |
| Dec  03-10, 2026 | [Energy Storage (Winter Session)](https://www.infocusinternational.com/energystorage-online)  Live Online  ---   Energy Storage – Online Training (Winter Session 2026) is a specialized executive program designed for energy professionals, policymakers, investors, and technology strategists. Delivered as a live online course over four sessions, it provides a comprehensive overview of the technologies, economics, and market drivers shaping the global energy storage sector. The program explores battery technologies, pumped hydro, thermal storage, hydrogen integration, and emerging innovations, while analyzing the role of storage in grid stability, renewable integration, and decarbonisation strategies. Participants will gain insights into business models, financing, policy frameworks, and risk management, supported by interactive discussions and real-world case studies. |
| Dec  25, 2026 | [iCrypto Awards 2026](https://icryptoawards.com/)  Dubai, UAE  ---   The global crypto community is about to witness a groundbreaking celebration of innovation, transparency, and true community spirit with the launch of iCrypto Awards: People’s Choice 2026, the world’s first blockchain and crypto awards determined entirely by the public. Organized by iEvents PRO, the iCrypto Awards recognize the most outstanding projects, exchanges, companies, media outlets, and individuals shaping the future of blockchain, Web3, DeFi, NFTs, metaverse, AI innovation, tokenization, Layer 2 technologies, and GameFi. |
| Apr  21-22, 2027 | [TOKEN2049 Dubai 2027](https://token2049.com/dubai)  Dubai, UAE  ---   The TOKEN2049 Dubai 2027 will convene founders, investors, developers, policymakers, and crypto enthusiasts to explore the evolving landscape of Web3, blockchain, and digital assets. As one of the world’s most influential crypto gatherings, TOKEN2049 emphasizes decentralized finance (DeFi), NFTs, DAOs, metaverse applications, regulatory frameworks, and institutional adoption. It provides a platform for product launches, investment opportunities, and strategic collaborations, positioning Dubai as a global hub for blockchain innovation and digital economy leadership. Distinctively, the Dubai edition highlights Middle East market dynamics, cross-border partnerships, and regulatory clarity, making it a premier marketplace for scaling blockchain solutions and shaping the future of decentralized technologies. |
| Jul  01-03, 2027 | [Blockchain Expo World 2026](https://blockchainexpoworld.com/)  Istanbul, Turkey  ---   Blockchain Expo World serves as a premier global platform designed to bridge the gap between cutting-edge technology providers and their target audiences. Organized under the supervision of the Union of Chambers and Commodity Exchanges of Turkey (TOBB), the event facilitates one-on-one marketing and high-level networking within the digital asset ecosystem. The summit features an extensive lineup of speakers, including government officials, academic leaders, and C-suite executives from major exchanges like Binance TR and BingX. Attendees can explore a diverse range of themes, from the "Future of Blockchain" and AI integration to decentralized finance and the evolution of Web3. By combining an expansive exhibition floor with expert-led panels, the expo aims to foster international collaboration and drive the growth of the regional and global blockchain industry. |

# Top Web3 Events & Crypto Conferences in 2026

›[Blog](https://redwerk.com/blog/)›Top Web3 Events & Crypto Conferences in 2026

* January 12, 2026
* 20 min read

Eager to explore the most compelling web3 events of 2026? We’ve sifted through countless event announcements, spoken directly with their organizers, and drawn on our industry contacts to compile this definitive list of the year’s standout blockchain and crypto conferences. From must-attend global summits to hidden gems that deliver high-value insights, these events cover the full scope of decentralized tech.

As a [development company with blockchain experience](https://redwerk.com/services/blockchain-development/) that’s collaborated with diverse clients worldwide, we knew how to prioritize the conferences capable of sparking meaningful partnerships and innovative breakthroughs. Whether you’re an investor aiming to identify the next big web3 trend, a founder polishing your pitch, or a developer hungry for cutting-edge solutions, these meetups provide the perfect environment to learn, connect, and grow. Here’s to embracing the latest in decentralization and forging powerful alliances in 2026!

## January 2026

### CFC St. Moritz, Jan 14–16, 2026, Davos, Switzerland (In-Person)

Looking for substance, not just buzzwords? CFC St. Moritz is where crypto’s dealmakers and traditional finance minds actually talk shop. A carefully curated digital assets and blockchain conference for just 250 top investors, founders, and policymakers. If you want crowd-free networking and strategic conversations, swap the busy expo floor for St. Moritz’s luxury alpine setting.

Forget the hype, focus on real impact. Here you’ll unpack the fresh intersection of blockchain, digital assets, and traditional finance: everything from post-quantum cryptography to live tokenization workshops. The discussions dive deep into tangible opportunities: tokenizing real-world assets, cross-chain DeFi for institutions, and navigating the new regulatory winds from the US and Europe.

**Pricing:**

* Invite-only

[Go to event site](https://cfc-stmoritz.com/ "CFC St. Moritz, Jan 14–16, 2026, Davos, Switzerland (In-Person)")

### Web3 Hub Davos, Jan 19–22, 2026, Davos, Switzerland (In-Person)

If you’re after substance and smart networking — not just endless keynotes — Web3 Hub Davos is the rising star on the blockchain events calendar. This four-day summit cuts through the noise to bring together heavyweight leaders, innovators, and decision-makers in a setting that’s equal parts sophisticated and friendly. Only the right people get in, so every conversation counts.

Set against the Swiss Alps, Web3 Hub Davos dials in on the transformative power of blockchain. Expect curated, invite-only sessions — from digital asset regulation to real-world adoption and how decentralized tech is shaking up global industries. You’ll join insiders, founders, and policymakers for genuinely meaningful discussions and all-day casual networking over refined local cuisine.

**Pricing:**

* Invite-only

[Go to event site](https://web3hubdavos.com/ "Web3 Hub Davos, Jan 19–22, 2026, Davos, Switzerland (In-Person)")

### Satoshi Roundtable, Jan 29–Feb 3, 2026, Dubai, UAE (In-Person)

Looking for next-level privacy and off-the-record depth? Satoshi Roundtable is where crypto’s original visionaries gather away from spotlights, media, and pitch decks. Now in its twelfth year, this invitation-only gathering brings together CEOs, developers, founders, academics, investors, and fintech leaders in a format focused on meaningful, high-level discussion — not hype.

Forget panels and press releases — here you set the agenda. The unconference format means you’re not just an attendee but a contributor among the people steering the course of Web3, Bitcoin, and decentralized finance. It’s an all-inclusive experience: private sessions, gourmet meals, resort comfort, and spontaneous breakout groups on topics like scaling, privacy, sidechains, and quantum-proof security.

**Pricing:**

* Invite-only

[Go to event site](https://satoshiroundtable.org/ "Satoshi Roundtable, Jan 29–Feb 3, 2026, Dubai, UAE (In-Person)")

## February 2026

### Digital Assets Forum, February 5-6, London, UK (In-Person)

Digital Assets Forum is one of the major crypto conferences in Europe, bringing together asset managers, family offices, banks, allocators, and market infrastructure players for two days of private roundtables, networking, and industry-defining panels.

Expect over 1,000 finance professionals, global banks, and VCs on stage, discussing everything from tokenization to regulation, AI, market structure, and DeFi. With dedicated 1:1 meeting zones, exclusive VIP night, and curated exhibition area, this is where the future of financial innovation and compliance gets built.

**Pricing:**

* From £999 + VAT for a two-day general pass (around $1,321)
* From £1,199 + VAT for a two-day VIP pass (around $1,586)

[Go to event site](https://eblockchainconvention.com/digital-assets-forum/ "Digital Assets Forum, February 5-6, London, UK (In-Person)")

### Consensus Hong Kong, Feb 10–12, 2026, Hong Kong (In-Person)

Consensus Hong Kong is the place where Web3 and crypto mean real business. With more than 15,000 attendees from over 100 countries, it truly earns its reputation as Asia’s top blockchain summit, a gateway for global leaders and innovators to connect, strike strategic deals, and set the industry’s next direction.

This crypto event packs four dynamic stages, from high-profile keynotes to specialized hackathons and live pitch sessions. Whether you’re chasing institutional partnerships, exploring the latest in AI and digital assets, or hungry to plug into the action that bridges East and West, this is where the global crypto crowd comes to accelerate business growth and collaborate at the highest level.

**Pricing:**

* From $599 for a standard pass
* From $1,199 for a platinum pass

[Go to event site](https://consensus-hongkong.coindesk.com/ "Consensus Hong Kong, Feb 10–12, 2026, Hong Kong (In-Person)")

### ETHDenver 2026, February 17-21, Denver, Colorado, USA (In-Person)

ETH Denver is the largest annual Ethereum event, blending hackathons, workshops, and an “innovation festival” atmosphere. Core devs, [DeFi protocols](https://redwerk.com/blog/smart-contract-audit-checklist/), and L2 project teams gather here to demo fresh ideas. Beyond dev sessions, expect lively networking parties, pitch competitions, and a full-week immersion into the Ethereum ecosystem.

If you’re a developer seeking collaboration or an investor scouting the next big DeFi or NFT platform, ETHDenver is perfect. Don’t miss the final hackathon showcase — many top web3 startups trace their roots to ETHDenver’s BUIDLathon.

**Pricing:**

* Available upon registration

[Go to event site](https://ethdenver.com/ "ETHDenver 2026, February 17-21, Denver, Colorado, USA (In-Person)")

## March 2026

### Crypto Expo Europe, March 1-2, Bucharest, Romania (In-Person)

Crypto Expo Europe is one of the largest crypto conferences in Eastern Europe. It’s the real deal for anyone looking to catch the latest in blockchain and web3. Hosted at the Radisson Blu, this event attracts over 3,000 founders, devs, VCs, and company leaders across Europe and beyond, all dialed in on what’s hot in crypto, DeFi, and digital assets. You’ll hear from the big players (think Binance, OKX, Bitget) as well as new voices breaking out in the region, all while grabbing practical insights on AI, asset tokenization, and [evolving regulations](https://qawerk.com/blog/cryptocurrency-regulation-mica-dora-dac8/).

Pitch sessions and hands-on workshops set the tone for direct learning, while the show floor buzzes with honest networking and next-gen tech demos. Fresh ideas meet fast dealmaking every year at Crypto Expo, meaning you’re rubbing shoulders with those actually doing the work, not just talking about it. In Central and Eastern Europe, this is where you join the action, find real community, and stay ahead in the fastest-growing crypto hub around.

**Pricing:**

* From €69 + VAT for a standard pass (around $80)
* From €279 + VAT for a VIP pass (around $324)

[Go to event site](https://cryptoexpoeurope.com/ "Crypto Expo Europe, March 1-2, Bucharest, Romania (In-Person)")

### DC Blockchain Summit, March 17–18, 2026, Washington, DC, USA (In-Person)

The DC Blockchain Summit, March 17–18, 2026, brings together top minds in blockchain and crypto policy, from tech founders and C-suite execs to U.S. policymakers. It’s the top stage for direct dialogue as new rules and digital asset strategies get mapped out by names like Donald Trump Jr., Richard Teng, and Anthony Scaramucci. If you want the pulse on the next wave of regulation and innovation, this blockchain conference is where business truly meets the government.

**Pricing:**

* From $149 for a student/gov/active duty pass
* From $2,299 for a VIP pass

[Go to event site](https://www.dcblockchainsummit.com/ "DC Blockchain Summit, March 17–18, 2026, Washington, DC, USA (In-Person)")

### Next Block Expo, March 24–25, 2026, Warsaw, Poland (In-Person)

Next Block Expo transforms Warsaw into Europe’s most energetic crypto and blockchain hub. With over 5,000 attendees and 200 speakers, NBX is designed for hands-on learning, sharp talks, and easy mingling with investors, founders, and tech teams. You’ll see bold pitches, catch insiders from Solana and Bitget, and watch the latest in DeFi, gaming, and AI get unveiled across interactive main stages and workshops.

This edition’s matchmaking platform is lightning-fast, so you’ll actually meet the right partners and clients, not just swap business cards. If you want to tap into what’s next for web3 in Central and Eastern Europe, NBX is the blockchain event you need.

**Pricing:**

* From $48 for a standard pass
* From $545 for a VIP pass

[Go to event site](https://nextblockexpo.com/ "Next Block Expo, March 24–25, 2026, Warsaw, Poland (In-Person)")

### Ethereum Community Conference (EthCC), March 30–April 2, 2026, Cannes, France (In-Person)

The Ethereum Community Conference (EthCC) is Europe’s go-to for all things Ethereum, uniting over 6,500 attendees and 400+ speakers for four days of bold ideas, sharp workshops, and next-level networking. Startups, visionaries, and top VCs meet on the stunning Côte d’Azur to break new ground in blockchain tech, investment, and real-world solutions. The energy is pure community — open, transparent, and packed with real opportunities. This is one of the blockchain conferences that covers many different subjects and addresses different levels of comprehension through talks and workshops

[Go to event site](https://ethcc.io/ "Ethereum Community Conference (EthCC), March 30–April 2, 2026, Cannes, France (In-Person)")

## April 2026

### UN:BLOCK, April 1-2, 2026, Riga, Latvia (In-Person)

UN:BLOCK is one of Northern Europe’s most anticipated crypto events, uniting over 1,200 attendees, 100 speakers, and 250 companies in a single day. It’s where [exchanges](https://qawerk.com/blog/dex-testing-checklist-ensure-your-exchanges-reliability-security/), protocols, VCs, and regulators converge to unpack RWA, tokenization, regulation, and next-gen adoption — with a year-round community for ongoing impact. Expect bold insights, sharp debates, and top networking as Riga becomes a true gateway to the European web3 economy.

**Pricing:**

* From €249 + VAT for a standard pass (around $289)
* From €499 + VAT for a VIP pass (around $580)

### Paris Blockchain Week, April 15–16, 2026, Paris, France (In-Person)

Paris Blockchain Week at the Carrousel du Louvre is Europe’s defining moment for blockchain and digital asset innovation. With 10,000+ participants and 500 speakers, this is where top execs, investors, and builders shape the future, pitching startups, joining hands-on workshops, and diving into key themes from AI and [MiCA regulation compliance](https://redwerk.com/services/mica-regulation-compliance/) to CBDCs and open finance. If your goal at web3 events is making real connections and gaining smart insights, Paris Blockchain Week is the conference that delivers

**Pricing:**

* From €1,999 + VAT for a VIP pass (around $2,324)

### Hong Kong Web3 2026, April 20–23, Hong Kong, China (In-Person)

Searching for web3 conferences in Asia? Hong Kong Web3 2026 is Asia’s flagship for all things blockchain and crypto, locking in over 50,000 visitors and 300+ speakers like Cathie Wood and Vitalik Buterin. Four full days packed with high-level talks, side events, and live demos, this gathering is where global projects, VCs, and regulators connect to set the agenda for DeFi, GameFi, RWA, and more. In the world’s most business-friendly crypto city, it’s the launchpad for the next big wave in web3.

**Pricing:**

* Free for students
* From $299 for a standard four-day pass

[Go to event site](https://www.web3festival.org/hongkong2026/#/zh "Hong Kong Web3 2026, April 20–23, Hong Kong, China (In-Person)")

### Bitcoin 2026, April 27–29, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA (In-Person)

Looking for the most disruptive Bitcoin conference? Bitcoin 2026 at The Venetian is the world’s flagship event for the entire Bitcoin community — miners, institutions, investors, and innovators. Thousands gather for three days packed with headline panels, deep-dive workshops, and the high-powered Expo Hall.

You’ll connect in premium networking lounges, tackle mining x AI at The Compute Village, and access curated tracks for every level, from whales to first-timers. If you want to meet the minds moving markets and scaling the next wave of Bitcoin, this is the room where it happens.

**Pricing:**

* From $1,968 for a passes & hotel package
* From $1,788 for a hotel-only package

[Go to event site](https://2026.b.tc/ "Bitcoin 2026, April 27–29, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA (In-Person)")

### TOKEN2049 Dubai, April 29–30, 2026, Dubai, UAE (In-Person)

TOKEN2049 Dubai stands as one of the world’s largest and most energetic blockchain and crypto gatherings, bringing together 15,000 attendees from 160+ countries and 4,000+ companies. Industry leaders, developers, and investors converge for two days packed with high-energy networking, strategy sessions, and totally immersive experiences — from live performances and dynamic workshops to signature Arabian hospitality.

Key topics cover everything from stablecoins and high-performance blockchains to DeFi and the digital economy, setting the global agenda for the year ahead. More than 200 speakers — Binance founder CZ, Eric Trump, and Paolo Ardoino among them — share the stage with top innovators and decision-makers, helping to shape the future of the crypto space.

**Pricing:**

* From $699 for a standard pass
* From $5,999 for a special-access pass

## Reasons to Attend Crypto Events & Conferences in 2026

Dying to attend a crypto conference but not sure how to pitch it to your boss? Let us do the heavy lifting. We’ve put together the most convincing arguments to help you secure those tickets you’ve been eyeing. Here is why attending these events is a smart investment:

* **Cost-Effective Networking:** You don’t need the most expensive VIP ticket to get results. Often, the highest-ROI interactions occur at “side events”, such as breakfasts, happy hours, and hackathons hosted by specific projects, rather than on the main stage. A General Admission pass (or even just being in the city during the event) is often enough to access the high-value networking zones where the real deals get done.
* **The AI x Crypto Convergence:** By 2026, the merger of artificial intelligence and blockchain will be the industry’s defining narrative. Conferences are the best place to see live demos of AI agents (software that transacts autonomously) and verify how blockchain authenticates AI data. It’s the only way to move beyond social media buzzwords and understand the technology in action.
* **Building Real-World Trust:** In an industry full of anonymous founders and avatars, face-to-face interaction is a massive competitive advantage. Shaking hands and sharing a meal fast-tracks trust for partnerships, fundraising, and hiring in a way that months of Zoom calls simply cannot.
* **Early Access to “Alpha”:** Critical information, such as upcoming protocol mergers, funding news, or regulatory shifts, is often shared in private conversations days or weeks before it hits news sites or X (Twitter). Being there in person allows you to position yourself ahead of the public narrative.
* **Institutional Deal-Making:** With clear regulations now in place, traditional finance (banks and asset managers) is heavily involved. Events are no longer just for crypto natives; they are the primary meeting grounds where corporate players and web3 innovators collaborate on integrating real-world assets (like tokenized bonds) into the blockchain.
* **Talent & Recruitment:** Whether you are hiring or looking for work, events are the ultimate job market. Founders often hire developers or marketers they meet at hackathons or after-parties on the spot, as they can instantly gauge culture fit and technical competence.

## Summing Up

Web3 events serve as catalysts for innovation, where diverse communities converge to share knowledge, scout investments, and form alliances. Whether you’re a developer, entrepreneur, investor, or just web3-curious, these 2026 web3 conferences offer invaluable opportunities to stay on top of evolving trends.

At Redwerk, we’re not just following the web3 revolution — we’re actively shaping it. Our blockchain expertise is evident in Tingl, a [secure messaging app](https://redwerk.com/case-studies/tingl/) designed for private conversations and crypto payments. Its beta launch on Product Hunt gained massive traction, leading to its acquisition by a major crypto player. Blockchain is redefining digital security, and we’re committed to building innovative, user-first solutions.

With blockchain’s potential expanding across industries, we continue to push boundaries, exploring new ways to enhance security, privacy, and decentralization. If you’re looking for a partner in web3 development, [let’s connect](https://redwerk.com/contact/)!

# 15 Best Crypto Conferences & Events in 2026 (Worldwide)

The 2026 crypto events are going to be larger than ever. Investors, officials, founders, developers and people of the world will also convene to exchange ideas. The leading events such as TOKEN2049,...
